Speaker 1: Hi, this is Dick Clark, live in Times Square. We're in a virtual snowstorm of confetti here in Times Square...
Speaker 2: There y'go, kids.
Speaker 3: And then the peacock bit me. Please kiss me at midnight.
Speaker 2: You seen Sandy?
Speaker 3: Ooh. Uh, I don't know how to tell you this, but she's in Monica's bedroom, getting it on with Max, that scientist geek. Ooh, look at that, I did know how to tell you.
